5.3.3.2 FasterGelu
Function Usage
In neural networks, GELU is an important activation function, which is inspired by
ReLU and Dropout. Specifically, random regular expression is introduced during
activation. To reduce the computing power requirements of GELU, versions such as
FastGelu are proposed in the industry. This API is a simplified version of
FasterGelu, which greatly improves the computing performance. The specific
